name: Jaffna Hills
overview: Thirteen bodies are unearthed in the mist-covered slopes of Jaffna Hills near Dehradun - victims of a killer who has been hunting in silence for seventeen years. As panic grips the city, SP Crime Vijay Kohli leads the investigation, but the case hits dangerously close to home.

trailers.title: Jaffna Hills | Official Teaser | New Hindi Web Series 2026 | Mystery Thriller | Kutingg
